programs.title: Flower & Flour
programs.desc: Dirk promises to read Flower and Flour a bedtime story but when he's too tired to continue, Flower has to step in and invent her own bedtime story.

programs.title: Big Lizard
programs.desc: Big Lizard and Cosima create a fantastic water ride when they dislodge an underwater rock blocking a volcanic vent. It's all good fun until they realise the sea is starting to change.

programs.title: Hey Duggee
programs.desc: Norrie is late to Squirrel Club, so Duggee teaches them all about the commute.

programs.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programs.desc: King Thistle struggles to cope during a busy day in which he has to launch a boat, judge a competition and make a speech.

programs.title: Superbuns
programs.desc: Uh oh! Buns breaks MeeMaw's remote by superheroing in the house and tries to fix it and 'improve' it with new homemade icons.

programs.title: Batwheels
programs.desc: Music Meister is stealing the singing voices of all the people in Gotham. Now it's up to bashful Buff to gain confidence in his voice and use it to take down Music Meister. / When Batwing's favorite Bat-Net gets ripped during a chase with Riddler, she must learn to let go of her old net. / Clayface, Gotham City's messiest villain, arrives to cause trouble during Gotham's annual Clean Up Day. / Buff makes a wish on a magic artifact for the other Batwheels to be turned into monster trucks, just like him!
